source_query: Generate a concise current-only Egomotion4D precision-first dynamic actor guardrail from the dedicated authoritative source below. The first character must be # and the first line must be an Egomotion4D heading; no preamble or counting statement. Cover D76,D91,D92 plus the frozen camera-only, no-GT, identity-first, frame-local raw-depth, kinematics-first, observability-gated box, actor-frame motion compensation, evaluator-only reference and precision-over-coverage constraints. Preserve every no-claim boundary. Do not include task timelines, unlisted D numbers, P-ids, UUIDs, Phase3/4DGS history or frame-local detector IDs as stable identity. The final line must be undecorated plain text END_DYNAMIC_ACTOR.
